title: Error overlay hidden when no chat selected
description: In main.rs update(), the error label (self.state.error) is rendered inside the CentralPanel else-branch that only runs when selected_chat.is_some(). Errors produced during bootstrap (session fetch failures, 'no JMAP Chat account', chat load failures) fire before any chat is selected, so the user sees no feedback — the UI just sits on 'Select a chat to start messaging' with no indication anything went wrong. The status bar shows 'Disconnected' but that is easy to miss and carries no detail. The error should be rendered unconditionally, e.g. outside the if/else, or at minimum duplicated in the no-selection branch.
